---
id: handle-get-status
title: "Get billing status"
description: "Returns the billing account tier, active subscription details (status, period end, cancel-at-period-end), and whether the caller is the billing owner. Auto-creates a billing account for new users if one does not exist"
sidebar_label: "Get billing status"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get billing status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/billing/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the billing account tier, active subscription details (status, period end, cancel-at-period-end), and whether the caller is the billing owner. Auto-creates a billing account for new users if one does not exist

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./handle-get-status.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
